# CIRIS - Accountability Infrastructure for Autonomous AI

> Verify me, not trust me.

CIRIS is open-source accountability infrastructure for autonomous AI. Every decision passes through a runtime conscience, every action is cryptographically attested, and the Coherence Ratchet makes deception more expensive every day the agent runs.

## Quick Links

- Homepage: https://ciris.ai
- Documentation: https://deepwiki.com/CIRISAI/CIRISAgent
- GitHub: https://github.com/CIRISAI/CIRISAgent
- Academic Paper: https://zenodo.org/records/17195221

## Key Concepts

### The Coherence Ratchet
Truth verification is O(1) against signed precedents. Deception requires solving SAT instances over the full constraint history—becoming NP-complete for k≥3 constraints. Honest actions reference prior signed commitments directly. Deceptive actions must satisfy an ever-growing constraint surface.

### Runtime Conscience
Four independent ethical faculties (entropy, coherence, optimization veto, epistemic humility) validate every action before execution. This is not a guardrail bolted on the outside—it's an architectural invariant that cannot be fine-tuned away.

### Mutual Intelligibility
Bidirectional legibility: the AI makes its reasoning legible to humans through reasoning traces and deferral rationales. Humans make their values legible to the AI through the Accord and Wise Authority structure.

## Core Pages

- [Vision](https://ciris.ai/vision): The Recursive Golden Rule and why CIRIS exists
- [How It Works](https://ciris.ai/how-it-works): The H3ERE 11-step reasoning pipeline
- [Coherence Ratchet](https://ciris.ai/coherence-ratchet): The formal thesis on computational asymmetry between truth and deception
- [Compare](https://ciris.ai/compare): Seven requirements for accountable AI and how existing approaches compare
- [First Contact](https://ciris.ai/first-contact): Getting started and the co-emergence thesis
- [Architecture](https://ciris.ai/architecture): 22 core services and infrastructure design
- [Trust & Identity](https://ciris.ai/trust): 5-level progressive attestation system
- [Safety](https://ciris.ai/safety): Kill switch, deferral cascades, conscience vetos

## Installation

### Mobile
- iOS: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/cirisagent/id6758524415
- Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=ai.ciris.mobile

### Desktop/Server
```bash
pip install ciris-agent
ciris-agent start --template sage --verbose
```

## Technical Resources

- [Research Status](https://ciris.ai/research-status): Current research status with honest limitations
- [Explore a Trace](https://ciris.ai/explore-a-trace): Interactive visualization of agent reasoning
- [CIRIS Scoring](https://ciris.ai/ciris-scoring): The scoring model for agent decisions
- [Models](https://ciris.ai/models): Supported LLM backends
- [Integrations](https://ciris.ai/integrations): Discord, Home Assistant, and more

## Governance

- [The CIRIS Accord](https://ciris.ai/ciris_accord.txt): The complete ethical framework
- [Safety Policy](https://ciris.ai/safety-policy): Operational safety guidelines
- [Privacy Policy](https://ciris.ai/privacy): Data handling and privacy practices
- [Warrant Canary](https://ciris.ai/canary): Transparency about legal requests
